## 2. Solvers & versions

- **OR-Tools**: `9.15.6755` (CP-SAT baseline)
- **INTELAG solvers** (3): `gpu-pdlp`, `lp`, `milp`
- Continuous-relaxation solvers report an **LP lower bound**, not the integer-schedule cost (labelled *LP-bound* in the tables).
